steps.title: Locate the subject and verb
steps.content: The subject is the strings inside the instrument, and the main verb phrase is are plucked. Standard English does not place punctuation between a subject and its immediately following verb.

steps.title: Reject boundary punctuation
steps.content: A inserts a colon, C inserts a dash, and D inserts a comma between the subject and verb. Each breaks the subject-verb connection. The sentence needs no punctuation after instrument. The answer is B.
